name: Protective Capital Structures Corp.
summary: Protective Capital Structures Corp. operates as a non-depository bank and finance company to create alternative capital financing strategies with lower default risk and volatility. It offers its proprietary Business Collateral Line-of-Credit (BCLOC) product and associates technologies, which incorporate both hybrid marketable securities and cash strategies. The company's BCLOC product is a security developed as a means of capital financing. It has packages as a fixed asset investment linked to an equity security, in order to minimize certain investment risks while providing for average investment returns for the given amount of risk anticipated. The BCLOC product uses technologies to mitigate client risk and grow their business investments as a part of the capital financing process. The company was formerly known as Heritage Capital Credit Corporation and changed its name to Protective Capital Structures Corp. in November 2008. Protective Capital Structures Corp. was incorporated in 1989 and is based in Wilmington, Delaware.
